project_type: VS Code extension (voxpilot) — on-device voice-to-code transcription. TypeScript, ~94 source files in src/*.ts, ~74 Vitest test files in src/test/*.test.ts.
language: TypeScript ^5.4 (project pins). strict mode. module=commonjs, target=ES2022, lib=[ES2022]. No enums/namespaces/decorators anywhere in src (verified) so the code is fully erasable TS.
build_system: npm scripts. build = esbuild bundling src/extension.ts -> dist/extension.js (format cjs, platform node, target node18, externals: vscode, onnxruntime-node, @huggingface/transformers). Canonical CI also runs `npx @vscode/vsce package`.
test_framework: Vitest ^4.1 (vitest --run). vitest.config.ts sets test.include=['src/test/**/*.test.ts'], globals:true, and aliases the `vscode` module to src/test/__mocks__/vscode.ts. Tests import { describe,it,expect,(vi),(beforeEach) } from 'vitest'. ~1210 test cases, ~2850 expect() calls. 15 files use vi.* ; ~10-11 use vi.mock('vscode', factory) (one uses vi.mock('fs', ...)); several use vi.useFakeTimers()/advanceTimersByTime().
build_command: CANONICAL (needs network, NOT available here): `npm run build` (esbuild) / `npx @vscode/vsce package`. HOST-BASED SMOKE (works offline, faithful proxy): `env -u NODE_OPTIONS bun build src/extension.ts --target=node --external vscode --external onnxruntime-node --external @huggingface/transformers --outfile /tmp/voxpilot-bundle.js` (verified: bundles 73 modules, ~0.54MB, exit 0).
test_command: CANONICAL (needs network, NOT available): `npm test` (vitest). HOST-BASED (must be built in FEAT-001): a node:test harness that runs the UNMODIFIED src/test/**/*.test.ts via node 22 type-stripping + an ESM resolve hook mapping 'vitest'->custom shim and 'vscode'->src/test/__mocks__/vscode.ts. Plain `bun test` is NOT acceptable as the gate (see environment_constraints).
verification_instructions: 1) Run the node:test harness over ALL src/test/**/*.test.ts and confirm a fully-green baseline (every test passes; record exact counts). 2) Run the bun build smoke check and confirm exit 0. 3) Best-effort `env -u NODE_OPTIONS tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json` for type safety (see typecheck note in environment_constraints). The node:test harness is the AUTHORITATIVE gate. ALWAYS prefix node/npm/bun/tsc invocations with `env -u NODE_OPTIONS` (or `unset NODE_OPTIONS`) — see gotcha below.
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/extension.js is the esbuild bundle output and is git-ignored (not checked in). No checked-in snapshots/generated fixtures. null for source control.
setup_instructions: There is NO `npm ci`/`npm install` step possible (network blocked, see below). Toolchain is preinstalled on the host: node v22.22.3 (nvm default), bun 1.2.14, and GLOBAL tsc/eslint/prettier under /opt/toolchains/.nvm/.../node_modules (resolvable as `tsc`, `eslint`, `prettier` on PATH). bun:test ships inside bun. node:test + node:assert ship inside node. No project node_modules exists or can be created.
environment_constraints: NETWORK = INTEGRATIONS_ONLY. The HTTP proxy returns 403 for registry.npmjs.org and all public hosts (verified via curl: 'CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403'). `npm ci`/`npm install` hang/fail; only ~empty package skeletons get created. Therefore vitest, esbuild, eslint, typescript@5.4, @types/node, and @types/vscode CANNOT be installed. This is a hard sandbox limit, not a choice. ||| CRITICAL GOTCHA: the env var NODE_OPTIONS='--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js' points to a non-existent file, so EVERY node/npm/bun/tsc/eslint invocation crashes with MODULE_NOT_FOUND unless you run it with `env -u NODE_OPTIONS <cmd>` or `unset NODE_OPTIONS` first. ||| `bun test`'s built-in vitest-compat is PARTIAL and CANNOT be extended: its `vi` lacks `mock` and fake timers, the vi object is regenerated per test file (preload mutations and defineProperty do not carry into test files), tsconfig `paths` and a node_modules/vitest stub are both IGNORED in `bun test` mode. Plain `bun test` yields 1175 pass / 35 fail / 11 errors purely from missing vi.mock + fake timers — NOT real bugs and NOT an acceptable baseline. Do NOT use `bun test` as the verification gate; build the node:test harness instead. ||| TYPECHECK note: `tsc --noEmit` floods with TS2307 (cannot find module 'vscode') and TS2591 (Buffer/process/setTimeout/child_process — missing @types/node) because the type packages are not installed; these are environmental, not code bugs. Treat tsc as best-effort/secondary; if used, add minimal ambient declarations in a harness-only file (e.g. .verify/ambient.d.ts) referenced by a SEPARATE harness tsconfig — NEVER weaken src or the real tsconfig.json — so that REAL type errors can surface above the noise. The node:test runtime harness is the authoritative correctness gate.
contribution_requirements: CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) gates on: `npx tsc --noEmit`, `npm test` (vitest), and vsce package build, all after `npm ci`. README claims '63 tests'. Goal: keep the real vitest test files UNMODIFIED in form (do not delete/skip/weaken tests to go green); the harness adapts the RUNNER, not the tests. New regression tests must be real (assert real behavior of real code paths, no mocks that paper over the logic under test).
key_patterns: Pure-logic modules with NO 'vscode' import (directly runnable/auditable): adaptiveNoiseReduction, autoPunctuation, neuralNoiseReduction, noiseGate, offlineModelManager, pairProgramming, smartSpacing, snippetMarketplace, soundFeedback, speakerDiarization, streamingTranscription, transcriber, vad, voiceCommands, walkyTalky, waveformVisualizer, localization, integrationTests. The other 75 modules import 'vscode' (aliased to the mock in tests). Tests assert exact strings/numbers via toBe (1580), toContain (240), toBeNull (159), toHaveLength (138), toBeGreaterThan (86), plus toEqual/toThrow/toHaveBeenCalled*/.not/.rejects.
relevant_files: vitest.config.ts (alias + include globs to mirror in the harness)
src/test/__mocks__/vscode.ts (the vscode mock the harness must map 'vscode' to; 136 lines)
tsconfig.json (do not weaken; create a separate harness tsconfig if needed for tsc)

src/autoPunctuation.ts, src/vad.ts, src/voiceCommands.ts, src/smartSpacing.ts, src/codeVocabulary.ts, src/snippetMarketplace.ts, src/transcriber.ts, src/walkyTalky.ts (pure-logic audit starting points)
directory_structure: Repo root /projects/sandbox/voxpilot: package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, .github/workflows/{ci,release}.yml, docs/, media/, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md. src/ has 94 *.ts modules (extension.ts entry, engine.ts orchestration, transcriber.ts ASR, audioCapture.ts, modelManager*.ts, vad.ts, plus dozens of feature modules) + src/globals.d.ts + src/test/ (74 *.test.ts + __mocks__/vscode.ts). Place all harness scaffolding under a new .verify/ directory (git-tracked) so it is reproducible; do not scatter files.
